notes: Ported from the original Cashiro EverestBankParser.kt (parser-core/src/main/kotlin/com/ritesh/parser/core/bank/EverestBankParser.kt). Everest Bank (Nepal, NPR) alert format: "Dear Customer, Your A/c <acct> is debited|credited by NPR <amt> For: <details>. Never Share Password/OTP With Anyone" The "For:" section drives merchant/reference: - "CWDR/<rrn>/<timestamp>" -> ATM withdrawal - "FPY:IBFT:<ref>:<id>:<bankcode>" -> Fonepay IBFT transfer - "<id>/<payment type>,<receiver>" -> payment type as merchant NOTE: the original checks its positive keywords BEFORE the base skip-list, so real bodies ending in "Never Share Password/OTP" still parse. The engine runs excludeKeywords first, so "otp" is deliberately NOT excluded here.

fixtures.name: debit mobile recharge
fixtures.body: Dear Customer, Your A/c 12345678 is debited by NPR 520.00 For: 9843368/Mobile Recharge,Ncell. Never Share Password/OTP With Anyone

fixtures.name: credit salary
fixtures.body: Dear Customer, Your A/c 87654321 is credited by NPR 15,000.00 For: Salary Payment/Monthly Salary,UJJ SH. Never Share Password/OTP With Anyone

fixtures.name: atm withdrawal
fixtures.body: Dear Customer, Your A/c 11223344 is debited by NPR 6,000.00 For: CWDR/521708008016/202508050854. Never Share Password/OTP With Anyone
